defendant_roster.name: Jeremiah Johnson
defendant_roster.title: Acting Operations Manager
defendant_roster.role_in_incident: Responded to 911 call in personal vehicle; drove plaintiff to remote location; orchestrated tow theft; present armed during provocation; co-authored false narrative with law enforcement
claims_applicable: 42 U.S.C. § 1985 — conspiracy to interfere with civil rights
State: negligent infliction of emotional distress
defendant_roster.notes: 20-year Rivercom career. Terminated months after incident. Misrepresented as 'volunteer tow driver' in police reports. Unclear if EMT-certified.

defendant_roster.name: Jana Johnson
defendant_roster.title: Unknown
defendant_roster.role_in_incident: Accompanied Jeremiah Johnson; assaulted plaintiff from behind with object; captured on video (footage deleted). Suspected to have been the 911 operator who handled initial call
claims_applicable: 42 U.S.C. § 1983 — excessive force / assault (if state actor)
defendant_roster.notes: Confirm or deny employment at Rivercom 911. Verify if she was the 911 operator on plaintiff's initial call.

defendant_roster.name: Brandon Huntington
defendant_roster.title: Owner
defendant_roster.agency: B&T Towing (dissolved at time of incident)
defendant_roster.role_in_incident: Called by Jeremiah Johnson; stole/drove plaintiff's truck without consent; demanded ransom; refused card payment; refused phone access
claims_applicable: 42 U.S.C. § 1983 — conspiracy (if acting in concert with state actor)
defendant_roster.notes: B&T Towing was dissolved with WA Secretary of State before incident — no legal capacity to perform towing services. Personal friend of Jeremiah Johnson.

defendant_roster.title: Agency

claims_applicable: Brady violation (suppression of exculpatory video evidence)
defendant_roster.notes: Prosecutorial immunity applies for advocacy functions. Focus on investigative/administrative functions and Brady obligations.

defendant_roster.name: Rivercom 911
defendant_roster.title: Agency
defendant_roster.role_in_incident: Employed Johnson; dispatched Johnson to respond personally; responsible for call handling and dispatch records
claims_applicable: Supervisory liability — failure to supervise Johnson
Obstruction — loss of 911 audio and alteration of CAD logs
defendant_roster.notes: Confirm oversight structure. Is Rivercom a county agency? Interlocal agreement? Private nonprofit?
